title: Fix stale client-side merge overwriting backed-team and side semantics

context.problem_statement: A read-only audit traced the backed-team mismatch to dashboard.html client-side merge logic. Cached mark data from an older trade on the same slug can overwrite the current trade's correct side/backed_team/faded_team semantics.
context.primary_root_cause: renderUnifiedPositions() performs a full-object spread from markMap into the current open paper position object.
context.secondary_finding: Games-tab openBySlug lookup uses inconsistent slug keys (stored with date, looked up without date).
context.manager_intent: Apply the smallest safe dashboard.html-only patch so stale cached mark data cannot overwrite semantic identity fields, and fix the Games-tab slug-key mismatch if it is safely in the same file.

objective: Preserve correct trade semantics in the dashboard by limiting stale cache merges to mark/price/game-state fields only, while keeping correct side/team identity from the current trade object.
forbidden_actions: Read every file in the repo
required_work: Inspect renderUnifiedPositions() merge logic in dashboard.html

Replace the full-object spread from markMap with a field-specific merge that copies only safe dynamic fields like current_price, unrealized_pnl_usd, live_equity_usd, mark_source, and current game-state fields
Do not allow cached merge data to overwrite side, backed_team, faded_team, entry_px, qty, id, or other identity fields of the current trade object
Inspect the Games-tab openBySlug key path and fix the slug-key mismatch if it is safely addressable in the same file
Keep the patch local and minimal
acceptance_criteria: Cached mark data no longer overwrites current trade side/backed_team/faded_team semantics
Current trade identity fields remain authoritative from the openPaperPositions source object
Games-tab open-position lookup uses consistent slug keys if the secondary bug is fixed in the same patch
No files outside allowed scope are modified
python syntax / structure remains valid for dashboard.html
verification_required: Explain old behavior vs new behavior
State whether the Games-tab slug mismatch was fixed too
Describe which fields are now merged and which are protected
State whether restart is required for the fix to take effect
